text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During training, Yukino Bijin drops by to bring us
some bottles of refreshing water.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says the way Gold City runs is beautiful, but
Gold City complains she'd rather be told she was
strong.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yukino Bijin insists that by "beautiful" she's not
referring only to Gold City's looks. Instead, it
describes everything about her, including her
strength and amazing skill.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City thinks back and laughs. Perhaps this is
what some people had meant when talking about
her all along.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Gold City gives a hearty laugh, Yukino Bijin
tells her that she's more beautiful than ever, and
Gold City agrees that she likes herself better
now, too.
